refs.description: The canonical C red-black tree implementation used throughout the Linux kernel, with insert/erase rebalancing via rotations and recoloring.
The CFS scheduler stores runnable tasks keyed by virtual runtime in a red-black tree for O(log n) leftmost-task selection.
java.util.TreeMap is implemented as a red-black tree, with explicit RED/BLACK coloring and fixAfterInsertion/fixAfterDeletion rebalancing.
